fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 39-year-old Hispanic female with schizoaffective disorder with moderate symptoms.
fields.Subjective: Ms. Rodriguez attended appointment with mother who assists with medication management. Mother confirms daughter takes paliperidone ER 12 mg each morning via supervision, no missed doses. Despite reliable adherence, continues experiencing moderate symptom burden. Reports persistent auditory hallucinations several times daily of voices making critical comments about her abilities. Also endorses paranoid thoughts that coworkers at her cleaning job talk about her behind her back. Sleep disrupted at 5 hours nightly with frequent awakenings. Appetite decreased, weight stable at 157 lbs. Working part-time as office cleaner, struggling with stress. Lives with mother who provides support. Limited social activities. Mood 'down and stressed' rated 4/10. Denies substance use. Mother concerned about ongoing symptoms. Safety: No SI/HI. (Assessed by Veronica Martinez, LCSW, Licensed Clinical Social Worker)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Casually dressed, fair grooming, appears anxious
Mental_Status_Examination.Thought_Content: Auditory hallucinations, paranoid ideation about coworkers

fields.Diagnostic_Impression: Schizoaffective Disorder with persistent symptoms and mood/anxiety components.
fields.Psychosocial_Context: Lives with mother; working part-time; limited social engagement; ongoing symptoms affecting function.
Assessment_and_Plan: Already on maximum dose paliperidone with ongoing symptoms.
Will add SSRI for mood and anxiety.
fields.Author: Note written by Veronica Martinez, LCSW, Licensed Clinical Social Worker — Latina Mental Health Collective, 3421 Community Plaza, Phoenix, AZ 85012, Phone: (555) 883-4409, Fax: (555) 883-4410
